mapper.select:
SELECT b.*, bc.name as category_name FROM book b LEFT JOIN book_category bc ON b.category_id = bc.id WHERE b.deleted = 0
AND (b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.isbn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND b.category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY b.create_time DESC
SELECT bc.name as name, COUNT(*) as count FROM book b JOIN book_category bc ON b.category_id = bc.id WHERE b.deleted = 0 GROUP BY b.category_id, bc.name ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT b.author as name, COUNT(*) as count FROM book b WHERE b.deleted = 0 AND b.author IS NOT NULL AND b.author != '' GROUP BY b.author ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT id, isbn, title, author, category_id, cover_image, borrow_count FROM book WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 0 ORDER BY borrow_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, isbn, title, author, category_id, cover_image, create_time FROM book WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM book WHERE isbn = #{isbn} AND deleted = 0
